searchQuery.title: Search query
searchQuery.description: Job search keywords, e.g. 'cloud engineer' or 'site reliability engineer'.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location filter for job search, e.g. 'United States' or 'Remote'.

maxJobs.title: Max jobs
maxJobs.description: Maximum number of job postings to extract.

maxPages.title: Max pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of pagination pages to follow.

urls.title: Start URLs
urls.description: Listing/detail page URLs to crawl. If empty, the actor can construct search URLs from searchQuery and location.
